title: Add admin GUI mode (--gui flag)
description:
Implement optional admin GUI for server monitoring.

**Files:**
- server/admin_gui.lua - Admin interface

**Features (visual only, no tests):**
- Server status panel (running, port, uptime)
- Connected players list with kick button
- Active games list with view/end options
- Scrollable server log
- Start/Stop button

**Usage:**
```bash
# Headless mode (default)
love server/

# GUI mode for local dev/monitoring
love server/ --gui
```

See: lua/love2d/docs/phases/phase10_multiplayer/phase10_multiplayer.md (10A.5)

title: Implement game state sync (receive)
description:
Implement client-side game state synchronization.

**Files:**
- src/client/game_client.lua - Game sync

**Implementation:**
- GameClient.handleGameState(message) updates local state
- GameClient.handleMoveResult(message) processes result
- GameClient.handlePowerResult(message) processes result
- Wait indicator for opponent's turn
- Connection status display
- Opponent disconnect handling

**Tests (spec/game_client_spec.lua):**
- GameClient.handleGameState updates local state
- GameClient.handleMoveResult processes result
- GameClient.handlePowerResult processes result

See: lua/love2d/docs/phases/phase10_multiplayer/phase10_multiplayer.md (10B.3)

title: Add guest authentication with unique names
description:
Implement player session management with unique guest names.

**Files:**
- server/session.lua - Player session tracking

**Implementation:**
- Session.create(playerId, name) creates session
- Session.validate(session) checks session validity
- Reject duplicate player names in lobby
- Generate unique guest IDs
- Track connection state per player

**Tests (spec/session_spec.lua):**
- Session creation with valid name
- Session validation
- Duplicate name rejection
- Guest ID uniqueness

See: lua/love2d/docs/phases/phase10_multiplayer/phase10_multiplayer.md

title: Implement action sending to server
description:
Implement client-side action sending for moves and powers.

**Files:**
- src/client/game_client.lua - Game client (extend)

**Implementation:**
- GameClient.sendMove(net, from, to) sends MOVE
- GameClient.sendPower(net, piece, powerId, target) sends ACTIVATE_POWER
- Disable input while waiting for server response
- Show pending action indicator

**Tests (spec/game_client_spec.lua):**
- GameClient.sendMove sends MOVE
- GameClient.sendPower sends ACTIVATE_POWER

See: lua/love2d/docs/phases/phase10_multiplayer/phase10_multiplayer.md (10B.3)

title: Handle disconnects gracefully
description:
Handle opponent disconnection during game.

**Implementation:**
- Detect opponent disconnect event
- Show 'Opponent disconnected' message
- Wait for reconnection timeout
- Award win if opponent doesn't return
- Return to lobby option
- Clean up game state

**UI:**
- Disconnect notification overlay
- Countdown timer for reconnection window
- Options to wait or return to lobby

See: lua/love2d/docs/phases/phase10_multiplayer/phase10_multiplayer.md (10C.2)

title: Implement server config file loading
description:
Create server_config.lua for configurable server settings.

**Config options:**
- port: 7777 (default)
- maxGames: 10
- maxPlayersPerGame: 2
- disconnectTimeout: 60 seconds
- persistence.enabled: true
- persistence.filepath: server_data.json
- persistence.autoSaveInterval: 60
- logging.level: info/debug/warn/error
- logging.filepath: server.log

**Implementation:**
- Load config from server_config.lua
- Validate config values
- Apply defaults for missing values

See: lua/love2d/docs/phases/phase10_multiplayer/phase10_multiplayer.md

title: Create network client module
description:
Implement client-side network connection management.

**Files:**
- src/client/network.lua - Connection management

**Implementation:**
- Network.create() returns network state
- Network.connect(net, host, port) establishes connection
- Network.disconnect(net) closes connection
- Network.send(net, message) sends protocol message
- Network.receive(net) returns pending messages
- Handle connection failure gracefully
- Detect disconnection

**Tests (spec/network_spec.lua):**
- Network.create returns network state
- Network.connect establishes connection
- Network.disconnect closes connection
- Network.send sends protocol message
- Network.receive returns pending messages
- Handles connection failure gracefully
- Detects disconnection

**Depends on:** Phase 10A complete (server must exist)

See: lua/love2d/docs/phases/phase10_multiplayer/phase10_multiplayer.md (10B.1)

title: Create lobby browser/join UI
description:
Create UI for browsing and joining games in lobby.

**UI Elements:**
- Game list with join buttons
- Create game button with name input
- Disconnect button
- Refresh game list button
- Player count per game
- Game status (waiting/in-progress)

**Implementation:**
- LobbyClient.joinLobby(net, playerName) sends JOIN_LOBBY
- LobbyClient.createGame(net, gameName) sends CREATE_GAME
- LobbyClient.joinGame(net, gameId) sends JOIN_GAME
- LobbyClient.leaveGame(net) sends LEAVE_GAME
- LobbyClient.refreshGames(net) requests game list

**Tests (spec/lobby_client_spec.lua):**
- LobbyClient.joinLobby sends JOIN_LOBBY
- LobbyClient.createGame sends CREATE_GAME
- LobbyClient.joinGame sends JOIN_GAME
- LobbyClient.leaveGame sends LEAVE_GAME
- LobbyClient.refreshGames requests game list

See: lua/love2d/docs/phases/phase10_multiplayer/phase10_multiplayer.md (10B.2)

title: Create lobby management system
description:
Implement lobby for players to create and join games.

**Files:**
- server/lobby.lua - Lobby management

**Implementation:**
- Lobby.create() returns empty lobby state
- Lobby.addPlayer(lobby, playerId, name) adds player
- Lobby.removePlayer(lobby, playerId) removes player
- Lobby.createGame(lobby, playerId, gameName) creates game
- Lobby.joinGame(lobby, playerId, gameId) joins existing game
- Lobby.leaveGame(lobby, playerId) leaves game
- Lobby.listGames(lobby) returns available games

**Tests (spec/lobby_spec.lua):**
- Lobby.create returns empty state
- Lobby.addPlayer adds player
- Lobby.removePlayer removes player
- Lobby.createGame creates game
- Lobby.joinGame joins existing game
- Lobby.leaveGame leaves game
- Lobby.listGames returns available games
- Rejects duplicate player names
- Rejects joining full games

See: lua/love2d/docs/phases/phase10_multiplayer/phase10_multiplayer.md (10A.2)

title: Add in-game chat system
description:
Implement chat between players during game.

**Implementation:**
- Chat.send(net, message) sends CHAT
- Chat.receive(message) processes CHAT_MESSAGE
- Chat history maintained (last N messages)
- Chat UI in game screen
- Enter key to open chat input

**Tests:**
- Chat.send sends CHAT message
- Chat.receive processes CHAT_MESSAGE
- Chat history maintained

**Depends on:** Phase 10B complete

See: lua/love2d/docs/phases/phase10_multiplayer/phase10_multiplayer.md (10C.1)

title: Build server connection UI
description:
Create UI for connecting to multiplayer server.

**UI Elements:**
- Enter player name field
- Server address input (default localhost:7777)
- Connect button
- Connection status indicator
- Error message display

**Implementation:**
- Add 'Multiplayer' to main menu
- Multiplayer lobby screen with connection form
- Validate player name (non-empty, reasonable length)
- Show connecting/connected/failed states

See: lua/love2d/docs/phases/phase10_multiplayer/phase10_multiplayer.md (10B.4)

title: Create Love2D headless server foundation
description:
Create the server directory structure and core server module.

**Files to create:**
- server/main.lua - Server entry point
- server/conf.lua - Server Love2D config  
- server/server.lua - Core server logic

**Implementation:**
- Server.create(config) initializes server state
- Server.start(server) begins listening on port
- Server.stop(server) stops cleanly
- Server.handleMessage(server, client, message) routes messages
- Handle client disconnect gracefully

**Tests (spec/server_spec.lua):**
- Server.create initializes server state
- Server.start begins listening
- Server.stop stops cleanly
- Server.handleMessage routes messages
- Server rejects invalid messages
- Server handles client disconnect

See: lua/love2d/docs/phases/phase10_multiplayer/phase10_multiplayer.md (10A.1)

title: Add file-based game persistence
description:
Implement save/load for server state.

**Files:**
- server/persistence.lua - File save/load

**Implementation:**
- Persistence.saveGames(filepath, games) writes to file
- Persistence.loadGames(filepath) reads from file
- Handle missing file gracefully
- Handle corrupted file gracefully
- Auto-save at configured interval

**Tests (spec/persistence_spec.lua):**
- Persistence.saveGames writes to file
- Persistence.loadGames reads from file
- Handles missing file gracefully
- Handles corrupted file gracefully

See: lua/love2d/docs/phases/phase10_multiplayer/phase10_multiplayer.md (10A.4)

title: Implement game state synchronization
description:
Implement active game session management and state sync.

**Files:**
- server/game_session.lua - Active game management

**Implementation:**
- GameSession.create(gameId, player1Id) creates waiting game
- GameSession.addPlayer(game, player2Id) starts game
- GameSession.handleMove(game, playerId, move) validates and applies
- GameSession.handlePower(game, playerId, power) validates and applies
- Detect game over conditions
- Broadcast state changes to both players

**Tests (spec/game_session_spec.lua):**
- GameSession.create creates waiting game
- GameSession.addPlayer starts game
- GameSession.handleMove validates and applies
- GameSession.handlePower validates and applies
- Rejects moves from wrong player
- Rejects invalid moves
- Detects game over

See: lua/love2d/docs/phases/phase10_multiplayer/phase10_multiplayer.md (10A.3)

title: export-state/ directory should be in .gitignore
description:
The export-state/ directory (added in v0.49.0 for per-worktree export state tracking) contains machine-specific paths (worktree_root) and local sync state. It should be added to the default .beads/.gitignore template since per-worktree state shouldn't be tracked in git.

Current .beads/.gitignore ignores similar local state files (sync-state.json, last-touched, redirect) but not export-state/.

File contents example:
```json
{
  "worktree_root": "/Users/vinnie/github/nnqr",
  "last_export_commit": "a5ee4608dd741d5b370292c8f1f55f00efd972ae",
  "last_export_time": "2026-01-25T09:35:26.33143-05:00",
  "jsonl_hash": "a0d84af5806a678a2ee26658bac31c61058f4fcde931b81d02a5dbf220c58cc9"
}
```

title: Add reconnection handling
description:
Implement automatic reconnection for dropped connections.

**Implementation:**
- Client detects disconnect
- Client attempts automatic reconnect
- Server accepts reconnect within timeout (60s)
- Game state restored after reconnect
- Show reconnecting status to user

**Tests:**
- Client detects disconnect
- Client attempts reconnect
- Server accepts reconnect within timeout
- Game state restored after reconnect
- Forfeit after timeout (60s)

See: lua/love2d/docs/phases/phase10_multiplayer/phase10_multiplayer.md (10C.2)

title: Implement match history
description:
Implement file-based game result logging and history view.

**Implementation:**
- File-based game result logging
- View past games screen
- Win/loss record per player name
- Game duration, opponent, result stored

**UI:**
- Match history screen accessible from main menu
- List of past games with date, opponent, result
- Overall win/loss statistics

See: lua/love2d/docs/phases/phase10_multiplayer/phase10_multiplayer.md (10C.3)
